# pages/

Catalog of every page under `pages/`. Each row links the **rendered** page
([mehrlander.github.io/web-tools/pages](https://mehrlander.github.io/web-tools/pages/)) and its **code** on github.com.

The live, auto-fetched directory is [pages/index.html](https://mehrlander.github.io/web-tools/pages/); this file
is its static, link-dense twin, regenerated by `npm run pages-index`.
